title: magnolia carsonii var. phaulanta
intro: Magnolia carsonii var. phaulanta, also known as 'Yellow Bird', is a plant species within the Magnoliaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its numerous health benefits, including its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Magnolia carsonii var. phaulanta is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in the production of herbal remedies, such as cough syrups and cold medicines.
